name: Winshear Gold Corp.
description: Winshear Metals Corp. (formerly Winshear Gold Corp.) is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of high-potential mining projects. The company is currently advancing the Thunder Bay Gold Project in Ontario, Canada, and the Portsoy Project in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, which targets high-grade nickel, copper, and cobalt mineralization. With a commitment to rigorous exploration and technical excellence, Winshear utilizes systematic geological programs to identify and evaluate mineral resources, aiming to create value for shareholders through the discovery and development of significant mineral deposits in stable, mining-friendly jurisdictions.
